nasb.text: But the eyes of the wicked will fail, And there will be no escape for them; And their hope is to breathe their last.”

esv.text: But the eyes of the wicked will fail; all way of escape will be lost to them, and their hope is to breathe their last.”

cnv.text: 但惡人的眼目必昏花， 逃亡之路也必斷絕， 他們的指望就是最後的一口氣。”

ccb.text: 但恶人必眼目失明，无路可逃， 他们的指望只有死亡。”
